name: Jambalaya
recipeIngredient: 1 pound fresh or frozen shrimp, shelled and cleaned
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly mix all ingredients except shrimp in Crock-Pot.
2. Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 10 hours.
3. One hour before serving, turn Crock-Pot to High. Stir in uncooked shrimp.
4. Cover and cook until shrimp are pink and tender.
5. Serves 4 to 6
